hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.go ]]; then gofmt -w "$FILE" || true; elif [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.jsx || "$FILE" == *.css || "$FILE" == *.json ]]; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/frontend" && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.go ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); while [[ ! -f "$DIR/go.mod" ]] && [[ "$DIR" != "/" ]]; do DIR=$(dirname "$DIR"); done; if [[ -f "$DIR/go.mod" ]]; then cd "$DIR" && go vet ./... 2>&1 | head -20; fi; elif [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/frontend" && npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -10; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [[ -z "$ROOT" ]]; then exit 0; fi; REL=${FILE#$ROOT/}; if [[ "$REL" == connector/* ]] && grep -qE "github.com/noui/platform/(dataaccess|intelligence|crm|correspondence|dataquality|knowledgebase)" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "❌ LAYER VIOLATION: connector/ must not import from platform/ services"; exit 1; elif [[ "$REL" == platform/* ]] && grep -q "github.com/noui/platform/connector" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "❌ LAYER VIOLATION: platform/ must not import from connector/"; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *test-fixture* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *test_fixture* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *demo-cases*fixture* ]]; then echo "⚠️  TEST FIXTURE MODIFIED — Fixture files contain hand-calculated expected values."; echo "These are the oracle. If code disagrees with the fixture, the code is wrong."; echo "If you believe the fixture has an error, STOP and flag for human review."; fi'

bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && echo "Pre-push: verifying frontend build..." && cd frontend && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo "✅ Frontend build OK" || echo "❌ Frontend build FAILED — fix before pushing"'

bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only); if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q "^connector/"; then cd connector && go test ./... -short -count=1 2>&1 | tail -3; cd ..; fi; if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q "^platform/"; then for svc in dataaccess intelligence crm correspondence dataquality knowledgebase; do if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q "^platform/$svc/"; then cd platform/$svc && go test ./... -count=1 2>&1 | tail -3; cd ../..; fi; done; fi; if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q "^frontend/"; then cd frontend && npm test -- --run 2>&1 | tail -5; fi'
